title: dregea sinensis var. sinensis
intro: Dregea sinensis var. sinensis, also known as Chinese foxglove or Yellow flower of the forest, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where its medicinal properties lie in its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Dregea sinensis var. sinensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional Chinese medicine.
